name: job-portal-root
description: Root project for running all microservices and frontend

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix services/auth" "npm run dev --prefix services/job" "npm run dev --prefix services/user" "npm run dev --prefix services/payment" "npm run dev --prefix services/utils" "npm run dev --prefix services/notification" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../services/auth && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../user && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../job && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../payment && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../utils && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
